title: Reply to Xiao Li, Zicheng Xu, and Feng Qi's Letter to the Editor re: Soumyajit Roy, Yilun Sun, Scott C. Morgan, et al. Effect of Prior Local Therapy on Response to First-line Androgen Receptor Axis Targeted Therapy in Metastatic Castrate-resistant Prostate Cancer: A Secondary Analysis of the COU-AA-302 Trial. Eur Urol 2023;83:571-9.
